title: Diamethysts Treasure2 Loot
description: An add-on for the Diamethysts mod that adds Diamethyst crystals and shards to Treasure2 chests.
body:
This is an official add-on to the Diamethysts and the Treasure2 (not currently on Modrinth) mods. These mods are required dependencies and this add-on mod will not work without them.

The mod simply gives a chance to find Diamethyst Crystals and Shards in Treasure2 treasure chests. Shards and crystals can also be thrown into wishing wells to receive rare and epic loot.


The Treasure2 mod requires the GottschCore mod. Treasure2 and GottschCore are developed and maintained by gottsch. Check out his other awesome mods here.


Other Diamethysts Add-ons:

More Diamethyst Arrow upgrades.


Adds a golem made of diamethyst.


Adds a selection of medieval weapons.


Check out my other mods:

Rebuild the long forgotten mystical tomes of ages past.



This mod is for Forge only. I do not have plans to port to Fabric at this time.
 
Modpack developers: You are welcome to include Diamethysts Treasure2 Loot in your modpack. Don't forget the Diamethysts, Treasure2, and GottschCore dependencies! If you are making the modpack public, please give me (mc_goodch) and gottsch appropriate credit for our mods.

Love this mod? Feel like donating? You can buy me a coffee!
